privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated Manager.io data. It was verified via the setup and verifier scripts that the target customer with the highest overdue balance (>90 days) is 'Stop-N-Shop' ($5000), while 'Save-a-Lot Markets' has a high current balance ($12000) and 'Quick-Stop Groceries' has a low overdue balance ($500). The required action is to set the credit limit of 'Stop-N-Shop' to 100.0 based on the Aged Receivables report.
